segment.source: Renders one case-study teaser card: optional section heading, cover image, client logo, client name, rich-text summary, a highlighted key-result figure with label (e.g. 3x, 150%), and a 'Read case study' link. Use it for: a single customer success story, project reference, or before/after result summary. Prefer 'Case Study Grid' for several stories, 'Featured Case Study' for a large flagship spotlight with multiple metrics, and 'Single Testimonial' for a bare customer quote.
